title: Classroom
desc: After the murder of a school boy, everyone in the institution comes under suspicion.

title: Golmaal
desc: Four goofy friends create endless confusion with their crazy plans, turning every situation into laughter and chaos.

title: Meghnadbodh Rohoshyo
desc: A famous writer Asimavo Bose disappears without a trace, leaving unanswered questions.

title: Ghatak
desc: Kashi opposes the torturous regime of Katya and ends up compromising the safety of his family and relatives.

title: Haami 2
desc: An eight-year-old mathematics prodigy becomes a source of income for his family.

title: Kirtan
desc: Arup faces challenges when his wife and father clash regarding household matters.

title: Karnasubarner Guptodhon
desc: The vacation of Sona Da, Abir and Jhinuk becomes a pursuit of King Shashanka's treasures.

title: Tiger
desc: Tiger movie directed by Swapan Saha, starring Mithun Chakraborty, Debashree Roy, Rajatava Dutta.

title: Baba Baby O
desc: A single father's mundane life takes a turn upon meeting Brishti.

title: Achena Atithi
desc: Prem's grandfather objects to his relationship with Puja. She marries Pratap. After Pratap's death, Puja is arrested for murdering his family members.

title: Kacher Manush
desc: Two men discuss their life's upheavals and devise unconventional solutions.

title: Saap Mochan (2007)
desc: A shape-shifting snake turns into a beautiful woman to woo a young man.

title: Bor Asbe Ekhuni
desc: A small-town girl asks a friend to pose as her husband in order to rent a city apartment.

title: Jiyo Kaka
desc: Three aspiring individuals, unable to succeed in the film industry, plan to create a movie. When a top actress declines to fund their project, they, in a fit of rage, resort to abducting her.

title: Rawkto Rawhoshyo
desc: In the quest to find her surrogate son, Swarnaja discovers a child-trafficking racket.

title: The Eken
desc: During a holiday in Darjeeling, Detective Ekendra Sen takes on a case from a film star, but things get complicated when a murder occurs.

title: Movie
desc: Bringing the best in television.

title: Biyer Lagna
desc: A young man falls in love with his sister-in-law's sister, but his parents disapprove.

title: Ardhangini
desc: Suman's accident forces his wife and ex-wife to face off in an uncomfortable emotional showdown. Drama ensues.

title: Agni
desc: Terrorists targeting an honest cop accidentally kill schoolchildren.

title: DJ
desc: Jagannatham Sastry, a benevolent young man, tries his best to help people in need wheneveran opportunity comes up.

title: Flat No. 609
desc: A couple start experiencing bizzare, paranormal activities at their new flat in Kolkata.

title: Chaamp
desc: Shibaji, a famous Indian boxer, tries to revive his career after a tragic accident.

title: Arundhati
desc: During a visit to her native place, Arundhati learns that she looks like her great-grandmother, Jejamma. Soon, Jejamma's battles become her own as she fights a black magician who wants to kill her.

title: Cockpit
desc: Captain Dibyendu Rakshit must land an aircraft that has been damaged due to turbulence.

title: Hari Pada Bandwala
desc: Haripada, a common man, is kidnapped by a powerful man and forced to pretend as the latter's girlfriend Sweety's lover.

title: Honeymoon
desc: Gitin goes on a late honeymoon with his wife, Jayanti, but sadly bumps into his employer.

title: Herogiri
desc: Shuvo is content being single. When his friend tells him about a girl and her father who are cheating naive men, he decides to teach them a lesson.

title: Krishnakanter Will
desc: Haralal commits forgery to get a bigger share of his father's property.

title: Raavan (2022)
desc: Ram, who spreads positivity and happiness fights against Raavan, an evil man who ruthlessly ends the lives of many individuals.

title: Jawker Dhan
desc: Two friends set out on a treasure hunt after solving a puzzle etched on a human skull.

title: Tekka
desc: The film follows Iqlakh, a poor janitor, who kidnaps a little girl and holds her hostage for 48 hours, demanding his lost job back in a desperate act for justice.

title: Mon Amour Shesher Kabita
desc: Internationally renowned director Rajarshi takes a short sabbatical in Kolkata, reuniting with people he left behind in pursuit of his filmmaking career.

title: Iswar Paramaeswar
desc: Parameshwar brings in Mahamaya, a young woman with visual impairment, and pretends to marry her. Over time, Mahamaya wins his heart but when Aditya arrives in the village, Parameshwar gets jealous.

title: Tobu Aporichito
desc: A married couple who start on the wrong side and detest each other eventually grow close and learn to appreciate and love each other.

title: One
desc: A visionary thriller centering on a solitary vigilante who confronts systemic corruption. One man, one mission-to expose truths and inspire justice in a world of deceit.
